prompt: Perform a heavy computation while preventing other agents from hijacking the TTL lease.
agent_thoughts: Spawning a heartbeat child-thread. It will ping the lock manager every 0.5s to keep my lease alive while I sleep for 2.5s.
plan: Agent 1 works for 2.5s. Heartbeat renews lock. Agent 2 waits patiently. No overlap occurs.
patch: Applied patches to Node 1 and Node 2 sequentially with no split-brain.
reason: Active Heartbeat successfully shielded the slow agent from false-positive deadlocks.
